matchedCandidate.identityEvidence: The requested LPF record is genus-level Acioa sp.; the Brazilian Forest Service page explicitly identifies Acioa sp. and uses this file as the record's principal wood image.
matchedCandidate.visualCheckNotes: Opened at original resolution. The image shows a clean reddish-brown exposed longitudinal wood surface with fine continuous grain; no living plant, bark exterior, furniture, generic texture, diagram, or microscopy appears. The page does not label the cut plane, so it is not guessed.
matchedCandidate.creator: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro, Laboratório de Produtos Florestais (LPF/SFB)
